name: subway-schedules
description: An api showing arrival times for any subway station

scripts.compile-styles: node-sass scss/main.scss --output-style expanded --source-map true --source-map-contents true --precision 6 public/css/main.css
scripts.deploy: git push origin main && sleep 6 && gh run watch $(gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')

author: Dan Zaharia
